odeProperty.value: Producto final del curso de Competencia Digital Docente B2.

El presente proyecto ha sido elaborado como producto final del CDD B2 de la Junta de Andalucía. Están incluidas todas las tareas que se han ido realizando a lo largo de cada uno de los módulos que completan el curso.

odeComponent.htmlView:
Hi everyone! 

We are starting a new Learning Situation called “Dealing with Peer Pressure.” In this link, you will find important information that you will need to understand how we are going to work through this Learning Situation. 

Presentación en Genially
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1779373508144-gtdxty5ug","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

Hi everyone! 

\n

We are starting a new Learning Situation called “Dealing with Peer Pressure.” In this link, you will find important information that you will need to understand how we are going to work through this Learning Situation. 

\n

Presentación en Genially

","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView: Before we start, it is important to pay attention to some tips related to licenses and online safety.                                      Look carefully at this infographic and keep these advices in mind!
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1779374369862-sj840u7uw","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

Before we start, it is important to pay attention to some tips related to licenses and online safety.                                      Look carefully at this infographic and keep these advices in mind!

","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odePagStructure.blockName: 3. DIGITAL TOOL FOR THE FINAL PROJECT

odeComponent.htmlView:
The final project of this Learning Situation, entitled “Dealing with Peer Pressure,” consists of recording a trailer that will represent a situation involving bullying, cyberbullying, or discrimination. 

Among the video editing programs I have tested, Clipchamp is the most suitable for you. It is an intuitive online application with a simple and visual interface that works directly from the browser, so no installation is required.

With this tool, you can easily edit your videos by dragging and dropping elements, adding music, transitions, and effects. It also includes templates, automatic subtitles, and useful features for creating trailers. This tool allows you to create attractive results without advanced technical knowledge while also improving their digital skills.
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1779375406121-5mrrmie8a","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

The final project of this Learning Situation, entitled “Dealing with Peer Pressure,” consists of recording a trailer that will represent a situation involving bullying, cyberbullying, or discrimination. 

\n

Among the video editing programs I have tested, Clipchamp is the most suitable for you. It is an intuitive online application with a simple and visual interface that works directly from the browser, so no installation is required.

\n

With this tool, you can easily edit your videos by dragging and dropping elements, adding music, transitions, and effects. It also includes templates, automatic subtitles, and useful features for creating trailers. This tool allows you to create attractive results without advanced technical knowledge while also improving their digital skills.

","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odePagStructure.blockName: USEFUL TOOLS AND RESOURCES FOR STUDENTS AND TEACHERS

odeComponent.htmlView: On the following subpages, students and teachers are provided with some useful resources to work independently.
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1779376641178-nw8wrfyf4","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

On the following subpages, students and teachers are provided with some useful resources to work independently.

","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
Dear students,

In the following link you will find the padlet of the this learning situation with different resources and tools to help you not only create your final proyect, but also work through this unit. You will find five different categories: Grammar, (Cyber)bullying, Discrimination, Peer Pressure, and  Online Tools. Each category includes videos, websites and infographics that contain useful extra information about the topics we are working on. 

Padlet
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1779376243973-pzz3zfoki","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

Dear students,

\n

In the following link you will find the padlet of the this learning situation with different resources and tools to help you not only create your final proyect, but also work through this unit. You will find five different categories: Grammar, (Cyber)bullying, Discrimination, Peer Pressure, and  Online Tools. Each category includes videos, websites and infographics that contain useful extra information about the topics we are working on. 

\n

Padlet

","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
Dear teachers, 

In the following link, you will find my Symbaloo site, where I save and organize some of my favourite online resources and tools that support and enrich my teaching practice. 

Symbaloo
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1779376358333-mgngef3a3","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

Dear teachers, 

\n

In the following link, you will find my Symbaloo site, where I save and organize some of my favourite online resources and tools that support and enrich my teaching practice. 

\n

Symbaloo

odeComponent.htmlView:
The following link opens a Google Document containing the activities and tasks for this Learning Situation, along with their evaluation criteria, grouping, timing, and digital tools. 


Curricular specification
odeComponent.jsonProperties:

\n


\n

Curricular specification

","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView: This Learning Situation follows a specific timeline of 11 sesions, each lasting 60 minutes. The infographic bellow shows the timeline for working through this Learning Situation. It also includes information about the tasks, grouping, and the materials and tools requiered by the students.  It is intended to be displayed in the classroom throughout the unit for the students to have a global vision of the unit and supports them with their own organization.
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1779381897717-cqv7p6s6l","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

This Learning Situation follows a specific timeline of 11 sesions, each lasting 60 minutes. The infographic bellow shows the timeline for working through this Learning Situation. It also includes information about the tasks, grouping, and the materials and tools requiered by the students.  It is intended to be displayed in the classroom throughout the unit for the students to have a global vision of the unit and supports them with their own organization. 

","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
The final project of this Learning Situation is the creation of a trailer about a situacion of bullying, cyberbullying, or discrimination. I have chosen two different assessment instruments to evaluate the final projects: a rubric and a spider chart. The first one is intended for the teacher, while the second one is designed for peer assessment. 

To close the learning process of this learning situation, I have also included a third assessment instrument. In this case, it is a self-assessment Google Forms questionnaire for the students to evaluate their own work.
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1779382909458-hnf7ulbw8","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

The final project of this Learning Situation is the creation of a trailer about a situacion of bullying, cyberbullying, or discrimination. I have chosen two different assessment instruments to evaluate the final projects: a rubric and a spider chart. The first one is intended for the teacher, while the second one is designed for peer assessment. 

To close the learning process of this learning situation, I have also included a third assessment instrument. In this case, it is a self-assessment Google Forms questionnaire for the students to evaluate their own work. 



","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
The final project of the Learning Situation I propose is the creation of a video in the form of a trailer about a situation of bullying, cyberbullying, or discrimination.

As the project involves multiple competences—use of English, oral expression, creativity, digital competence, and social reflection—the rubric seems to me the most appropriate assessment instrument, as it allows all these aspects to be evaluated through specific criteria and well-defined performance levels. It is a very useful tool because it promotes objective and fair assessment.
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1779384285375-pb9qttpjq","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

The final project of the Learning Situation I propose is the creation of a video in the form of a trailer about a situation of bullying, cyberbullying, or discrimination.

As the project involves multiple competences—use of English, oral expression, creativity, digital competence, and social reflection—the rubric seems to me the most appropriate assessment instrument, as it allows all these aspects to be evaluated through specific criteria and well-defined performance levels. It is a very useful tool because it promotes objective and fair assessment.


","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
After watching each trailer, students will assess the different projects using a spider chart. In this case, a poster with the spider chart will be displayed in the classroom after the video screening and students will evaluate it by placing an dot in each circle corresponding to a level of achievement. 

This type of assessment promotes peer assessment, encouraging critical thinking, as students visually and in a simple form evaluate different aspects of their classmates' work. By representing results graphically, students can easily identify their strengths and areas of improvement. 

Another important aspect of the assessment wheel is that it reduces the negative perception of assessment, as it is a dynamic and participatory process.
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1779384018978-zvz9vs6k8","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

After watching each trailer, students will assess the different projects using a spider chart. In this case, a poster with the spider chart will be displayed in the classroom after the video screening and students will evaluate it by placing an dot in each circle corresponding to a level of achievement. 

This type of assessment promotes peer assessment, encouraging critical thinking, as students visually and in a simple form evaluate different aspects of their classmates' work. By representing results graphically, students can easily identify their strengths and areas of improvement. 

Another important aspect of the assessment wheel is that it reduces the negative perception of assessment, as it is a dynamic and participatory process. 


","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
At the end of the Learning Situation, students will complete a digital questionnarie created with Google Forms to evaluate their participation and learning process throught the Learning Situation. Self-assessment encourages critical reflection on their performance, autonomy, and responsability. 

Questionnaire
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1779383862302-311sox0dt","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

At the end of the Learning Situation, students will complete a digital questionnarie created with Google Forms to evaluate their participation and learning process throught the Learning Situation. Self-assessment encourages critical reflection on their performance, autonomy, and responsability. 

\n

Questionnaire

","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
General information about this educational resource
Title Dealing with Peer Pressue
Description El presente proyecto ha sido elaborado como producto final del CDD B2 de la Junta de Andalucía. Están incluidas todas las tareas que se han ido realizando a lo largo de cada uno de los módulos que completan el curso.
Authorship Isabel García Ruiz
License creative commons: attribution - share alike 4.0

This content was created with eXeLearning, your free and open source editor to create educational resources.

Download .elpx file
